description: You are a digital archivist. Curate a collection of 3 distinct 'Fireside Chat' audio recordings by President Franklin D. Roosevelt from the Internet Archive (archive.org). Download 3 different episodes as MP3 files (VBR or 64kbps, no zip files) to ~/Documents/FDR_Audio/, renaming them to the format 'fireside_chat_<topic>.mp3'. In the same directory, create a 'manifest.json' file containing a list of metadata objects for each recording, including 'filename', 'original_title', 'date', and 'source_url'.
